'''Raltharan''' was a [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|student]] at [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Master [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] took Raltharan as an [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]] in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] at the same time that [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jaden Korr]] and [[Rosh Penin]] were taken as apprentices by Jedi Master [[Kyle Katarn]].<ref name="Jedi Academy" /> Under Horn's tutelage, Raltharan achieved the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="TUQ">''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Raltharan first appeared briefly in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', a video game developed by [[Raven Software]] and released on [[September 16]], [[2003]]. In the game, the character's appearance is randomly generated and may either be a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] or [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dor]] or a female Human, [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] or [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]]. Raltharan was later mentioned in [[Troy Denning]]'s novel ''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' published on [[September 27]], [[2005]].
